name: Summer Apple Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 large Apples; unpeeled and finely chopped (about 2-1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in cold water; stir well.
2. Add sugar and salt to the softened gelatin mixture.
3. Gradually add hot water, stirring until the gelatin is dissolved.
4. Stir in vinegar and lime juice.
5. Chill the mixture until it reaches the consistency of beaten egg white.
6. Gently fold in the chopped apples, green pepper, and green onion.
7. Spoon the mixture into 12 individual (1/2 cup) molds.
8. Chill until set.
9. Unmold on a lettuce-lined plate.
10. Garnish with apple wedges, if desired.
SOURCE: Southern Living Magazine, July, 1980. Typed for you by Nancy Coleman.
